text: The only bad workout is the one that didn't happen.
author: Unknown

text: Strength does not come from the body. It comes from the will.
author: Unknown

text: The iron never lies to you.
author: Henry Rollins

text: What hurts today makes you stronger tomorrow.
author: Jay Cutler

text: The last three or four reps is what makes the muscle grow.
author: Arnold Schwarzenegger

text: No man has the right to be an amateur in the matter of physical training.
author: Socrates

text: The resistance that you fight physically in the gym and the resistance that you fight in life can only build a strong character.
author: Arnold Schwarzenegger

text: You don't have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
author: Zig Ziglar

text: Success isn't always about greatness. It's about consistency.
author: Dwayne Johnson

text: The body achieves what the mind believes.
author: Unknown

text: Train insane or remain the same.
author: Unknown

text: Your body can stand almost anything. It's your mind that you have to convince.
author: Unknown
